programme.title: Ninja III: The Domination
programme.desc: Possessed by the spirit of a diabolical Ninja assassin and dominated by his relentless rage, a young, attractive woman sets out to brutally attack and destroy his enemies. Can her boyfriend and a martial arts master possibly save her soul?

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: When one of the US Air Force’s most modern tactical aircraft crashes in the sea near Malta, the CIA dispatches their best agent to salvage the plane's advanced weapons system before it falls into enemy hands.

programme.title: Enter the Ninja
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, police quickly arrested the most likely suspect. But cutting-edge technology from NASA enabled a forensic odontologist to prove the wrong man was behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 9-year-old girl goes missing, police and volunteers spend weeks searching for her. A psychic's vision leads to a field where her body is discovered, along with what investigators hope is enough evidence to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women went missing and were later found brutally murdered, police wondered if they were victims of a hate crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1969, 25-year-old phone operator Diane Maxwell was raped and murdered. Her brother promised he'd find out who was responsible and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Derrick Duehren returned to find his Oregon home burned to the ground. His wife's charred remains were later found in the rubble. Investigators set out to determine if it was an unfortunate accident or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2003, St. Cloud teenager Jason MacLennan returned home after a night out with friends and discovered his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: Barney & Friends

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Zorro inventó una máquina que puede llevarse cosas súper rápido y va a llevarse todos los regalos del cumpleaños de Tico. ¡Súper Espías Dora y Botas, al rescate!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Hoy es un gran día para ir a la escuela! La maestra de música de Botas, necesita ir a la escuela rápidamente, pero ¡su bicicleta está rota!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Es la fiesta de 15 años de la prima de Dora, Daisy. Pero la fiesta no puede empezar sin Dora y Botas. Ellos les enseñarán a bailar el mambo a todos.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: El primo de Dora, Diego, protege a todos los animales de la selva. Pero al tratar de salvar a un pajarito bebé, Diego termina atrapado y ahora necesita nuestra ayuda. ¡No te preocupes, Diego!

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: ¡Oh, no! El mejor amigo de Bebé Jaguar, el Bebé Oso, está atrapado en el borde de una montaña y se está por caer. Con Bebé Jaguar como líder, Dora, Botas y Diego corren al rescate.

programme.title: Dora la exploradora
programme.desc: Dora y Botas se disponen a ayudar al Rey Juan el Bobo a que encuentre su corona para que todos puedan ir al cumpleaños de su Mami. ¿A dónde habrá dejado su corona este rey olvidadizo?

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cliff, el perro grasoso, deja a su sobrina bebé al cuidado de Gato. /Gato se une a un club exclusivo de gatos. /Gato y Perro se suben al escenario y cantan sobre como se llevan bien.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cat sets out to beat his childhood rival, Mindy Wonderful, and be the first to climb to the top of Mount Nearburg. / Cat, Dog, Mervis, and Mr. Sunshine become stranded in a garbage container.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: CatDog set out to find the legendary Fred the Flying Fish. / The magician Ray saws CatDog in half and is soon taken to jail.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Jugando al béisbol en la arena, Perro es una superestrella. / Perro y Gato practican sus movimientos de cha cha cha para la próxima fiesta de baile./ Perro y Gato, en su primera carrera de esquí, causan caos.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: U+000A199 / 5.000U+000APerro arrastra a Gato a ver una película de ciencia ficción por 73.ª vez y se embarcan en una aventura espacial. / Perro abre los frascos que contienen las ocho vidas adicionales de Gato y libera a todas las apariciones fantasmales.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato lleva a Perro al Museo de Historia Natural, donde Perro babea por toda la exhibición de esqueletos de dinosaurios. / El Hombrecito Azul muestra videos de Gato-Perro hablando durante el desayuno.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato intenta enseñarle a Perro los puntos principales del golf. / Perro está con un caso grave de estornudos y el doctor Rancio, el conejo, le diagnostica a Perro una alergia de gatos.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato necesita surfear una ola gigante para conquistar a la surfista que le gusta. Pero hay un gran problema: ¡los gatos odian el agua! / Para su consternación, Perro sigue su instinto y persigue una libélula por toda la casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Hartos el uno del otro, Gato y Perro sueñan que son criaturas separadas que nunca se han conocido y que no están apegados el uno al otro. / Un camión lleno de ovejas se estrella cerca de la casa de Gato Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Para ahorrar dinero en facturas de electricidad, Gato engancha el perro hipercinético a una cinta de correr con el fin de crear su propio jugo. / Gato limpia minuciosamente la casa preparándose para la visita de Sally.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Rancio se acerca a Perro y Gato y dice que va a demoler su casa. / Perro y Gato son los favoritos para ganar el Premio de Chico de la Selva del Año, pero primero deben ganar su medalla de camping.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en el estanque de Rancio porque Perro orina en la pierna del perrero. / Perro y Gato buscan un alma gemela para Tito porque piensan que, si se enamora, dejará de atormentarlos.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es la antigua Inglaterra y Rancio es el rey. Mientras tanto, Perro y Gato viven una probre vida de recolectores de basura. / Perro y Gato se enamoran de Loraine Dejardin, a quien le gusta la ópera.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Dunglap contrata a Perro para que coma su tarea, así realmente puede decir la excusa de que mi perro se comió la tarea. / Perro y Gato se convencen de que una gran nube negra se aproxima y es el fin del mundo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se hace cargo de una ruta de reparto de periódicos en el vecindario después de que Perro persigue al repartidor de periódicos, nuevamente, y él renuncia. / Perro y Gato conoce a Dan Stan, otro Perro y Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato descubren que Cliff, está asistiendo a clases de ballet. /Randolph reúne a Gato y Perro en el circo. Perro y Gato se presentan al público, pero nadie los aplaude.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En el centro comercial, Perro y Gato se sientan sobre el regazo de Santa cuando una malcriada niña (la sobrina de Rancio el Conejo) anuncia que quiere a Perro y Gato como regalo de Navidad.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato logran conseguir un nuevo trabajo como Perro Bombero en el departamento de bomberos de Nearburg. / Perro entra al espectáculo de perros de Nearburg y se disfraza como un afgano peludo con corte de cabello.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El hambriento Perro y Gato comen una tonelada de comida en Rib Room, se ponen muy obesos y desafortunadamente no pueden pagar la cuenta de un muy altísimo costo. / Perro y Gato convierten su casa en un hotel de lujo para ganar dinero.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Shriek decide renunciar a los Grasosos y cumplir su sueño de ser campeón de patinaje sobre hielo. / Perro se golpea en la cabeza mientras persigue el camión de la basura y le da amnesia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras pasean por la Feria Estatal, Perro y Gato se encuentran montando sobre un feroz toro. / El odontólogo Rancio el Conejo descubre que cualquier cosa que Perro coma, afecta a los dientes de Gato y viceversa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: A pesar de las objeciones de Gato, Perro arrastra a Gato al Parque Temático para subirse a Butt Buster, una montaña rusa que va a 200 millas por hora. / El Alcalde Rancio necesita más fondos para su tina de monedas de oro.

programme.desc: Kin'emon, Momonosuke, and the others can't fight back tears when they hear that Hiyori is alive. Zoro is stunned by Enma's demonic power and its ties to him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The resolution that passed the Reverie and the incidents surrounding the conference stun people all over the world and corner the Seven Warlords of the Sea. Meanwhile, a Navy captain Koby secretly contacts someone who is currently in the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Admiral Issho and Fleet Admiral Sakazuki argue over the abolition of the Seven Warlord system and the alliance of the two Emperors of the Sea. Meanwhile, ex-Fleet Admiral Sengoku teaches the young Navy soldiers about the legendary Rocks Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the day of the Fire Festival, Orochi leaves the mainland of the Land of Wano heading for Onigashima where a big banquet will take place.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The night before the great battle, Orochi orders the destruction of the Sunny along with some bridges across the country to block Akazaya samurai's allies from their rendezvous.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When the angry mountain god, the giant boar, almost kills Kin'emon, Oden steps in. Kin'emon is impressed when he sees Oden's strength and pledges his life to serve him.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden transforms the wild land of Kuri into a habitable region and is made Daimyo over it. Then he meets Kawamatsu the Kappa and the two Minks, Dogstorm and Cat Viper, who become his followers like the others.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Whitebeard and his crew dock at one of the ports in the Land of Wano with their broken ship and the news excites Oden. He runs to the port and asks Whitebeard to let him get on board the ship but the request is rejected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden's journey finally begins. He is in awe of all the things that he has never seen before. And for the first time in his life, he becomes a wanted person and makes the headlines which catches the eye of a high-profile figure.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the Land of Wano, the Shogun Sukiyaki falls critically ill and names Orochi proxy Shogun until Oden returns in case he dies.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Roger is amazed when he finds out that Oden can read the script on the Ponegliff since he believes it will guide him to the last, undiscovered island where no man has ever been.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Singing out loud, the Roger Pirates continue on with their journey. They soar up to the island above the clouds and go down into the deep sea to get to the island at the sea bottom.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden and the Roger Pirates head for the Land of Wano to obtain a copy of the Road Ponegliff. Oden sees Kin'emon and the others for the first time in years, but he immediately returns to the sea leaving his wife and children behind.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After reaching Laugh Tale, Roger declares the disbanding of his pirate group and disembarks first. Oden gets dropped off at the Land of Wano and reunites with his family and retainers.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Enraged by Orochi's tyrannical acts, Oden raids his castle in the Flower Capital and points his sword at Orochi. However, hours later, people who were waiting for Oden to come out after defeating Orochi see the unexpected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden keeps dancing naked in the Flower Capital and losing all the trust of the people. One day, Orochi comes to Kuri and reveals his evil plan for the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaido comes to the mainland along with his troops to fight against Oden and the Akazaya samurai who were on their way to raid Kaido's mansion. Even though Oden's group are unprepared and outnumbered, they fight hard to save the future of the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oden and the Akazaya members are sentenced to death by boiling in a pot. Oden asks for a chance to survive which is accepted by Kaido. Then, Oden enters the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Oden continues trying to survive in the boiling pot holding his retainers over his head, people learn the truth from Shinobu and get shocked. At the same time, Oden tells his retainers the importance of opening the borders of the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Kin'emon and the others run to Oden Castle to save Oden's family, the castle is set on fire and Kaido attacks Toki and her children.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and thousands of allies who were supposed to be there are nowhere to be found, but Kin'emon and the others decide to set sail to the stormy sea in a small boat.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Law, and Kid join the Akazaya samurai and begin to fight Kaido's army. The three rivals from the Worst Generation compete with each other as they attack the enemy fleet with their ultimate skills.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Akazaya members are surprised by help from their old mate and Kin'emon notices he made a big mistake which has luckily saved all his allies. As their battle against Kaido's army heats up, the cornered Kanjuro makes a stunning move.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Swept away by Kanjuro, Momonosuke remembers his father, tries to rise above his fear, and speak to his allies. Luffy and the others start heading for Onigashima, but Kaido's army gets in their way again with a formidable weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hat crew are excited to see Jimbei again and welcome him as a new member. Meanwhile, Law and the Akazaya members strategize on how to enter Onigashima and attack Kaido.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: To Law and the others' surprise, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats attack the giant torii gate in front of Onigashima. Meanwhile, Kaido and Orochi are having a big banquet on the island where Kaido's formidable subordinates are also called in.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos caminan por un sendero y caen en un hoyo cavado por un grupo de traviesos Squirtle. ¿Por qué el Escuadrón Squirtle es una amenaza para la gente del lugar?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: The Writers' Room

programme.title: The Writers' Room

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Dexter, the show about a serial killer with a strict moral code. Now in its 8th and final season, get rare insights from actor Michael C. Hall and show runner, Scott Buck, and the team who brought Dexter Morgan to life.

programme.title: The Writers' Room

programme.title: The Writers' Room
programme.desc: Go behind the curtain of one of the scariest and most unique TV series, American Horror Story, with creators Ryan Murphy & Brad Falchuck. See these creative minds spill the secrets of their success behind "one of the greatest TV dramas ever created."

programme.title: The Writers' Room

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A year after a teenage boy, Jason Shields, dies in a freak accident after discovering he was adopted, Melinda must help him find his birth mother before he can crossover.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When a young woman dies following a routine procedure in the operating room, Melinda uncovers the truth that the doctor is secretly suffering from dementia and made a mistake during the women's operation that caused her death.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Jim starts behaving uncharacteristically, Melinda learns Jim is being haunted by the ghost of an ex-con, Julian Borgia, who has been attached to Jim ever since Jim was unable to save Julian's life in route to the hospital.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Soon after Melinda's car is stolen by a troubled teenage boy, Kirk Jensen, Kirk's dead mother, Lacy, sends Melinda messages through Electronic Voice Phenomena (EVP) or "white noise" in her car radio and other electronics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: A young bride-to-be is haunted by the dead wife, Ursula, of her fiancé before their upcoming wedding. Melinda learns Ursula died in a car crash on the way to her wedding reception with Mark, and now she can't bear to see Mark marry someone else.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When an up and coming boxing sensation is haunted by the ghost of his mother, whose death caused a rift between him and his father, Melinda must broker peace between them before the mother can crossover.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: While Andrea prepares to do standup at a nearby comedy club that is closing its doors, Melinda encounters a troubled dead stand-up comedian (Marty Golden), who is haunting the old comedy club, along with other dead comics.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda's mysterious new neighbor is haunted by an old classmate's dead grandfather, who suspects Tom kidnapped and killed his granddaughter.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: The ghost of an executed prisoner seeks Melinda's help in uncovering a contract for his valuable paintings before they're sold and his estranged daughter and struggling artist doesn't see a penny of what the contract says she is entitled to.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When Melinda's first ghost reappears, her presence triggers Melinda to remember when she first discovered her "gift" and the strain it put on her relationship with her mother, who couldn't understand what Melinda was going through.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: When the ghost of Andrea's friend starts haunting her, Andrea learns that he was hospitalized in a hiking accident and every time he flat lines, his ghost tries to give her clues.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers’ pasts – but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender

programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A nasty slumlord threatening to evict a single mother and her daughter is later suspected of murder, but Gillespie’s hands are tied as this is Sheriff McComb’s case. Meanwhile, Parker has a new speed gun and he’s become the most hated man in Sparta.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The shooting of the campaign manager of a white supremacist politician appears to be a botched assassination attempt on the Senate candidate himself, but it soon reveals a web of deceit and betrayal. Was the assassination botched intentionally?

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: When one of Walker's friends in the DEA goes missing and suspected of being kidnapped by Mexican drug lords, he decides to take an unexpected vacation...and heads south of the border.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A country singer performs at C.D.'s. Walker takes a liking to her. But her ex-husband who doesn't want to let her go follows her and stalks her. Walker tries to help her.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Someone is killing criminals who are not convicted due to insufficient evidence. Alex learns there is a committee of vigilantes who determine which people to kill, and she asks Walker to become part of the committee to find the ring leader.

programme.desc: Amber & Gary finally go to therapy. Maci & Taylor plan a romantic date to work on their marriage. Mackenzie's father asks to take Jaxie to Oklahoma for the summer. Catelynn and Tyler welcome their fourth and final child.

programme.desc: Teen Mom Jenelle's partying forces her mom to take away custody and Leah tries to work things out with the father of her twins. Chelsea tries to get on track to graduate, while Kailyn is heartbroken after her breakup with Jo.

programme.desc: Leah breaks down when the health of one of her twins is in question, while Chelsea starts hanging out with her ex-boyfriend. Kailyn starts dating a new guy, much to the dismay of her ex Jo and Jenelle tries to move back home.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn is forced to borrow money from Jo to pay for school and Chelsea lets Adam move in so Aubree can have a normal family. Jenelle meets a new guy and spends the night with him, while Leah and Corey decide to move in together.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle is trying to figure out how to pay for school and continues to get in trouble, while things get tough for Leah and Corey. Adam moves in and Chelsea tries to hide it, and Kailyn deals with getting kicked out of Jo's house.

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Cecilia se hace la prueba y confirma su embarazo de David. Él le dice que no quiere ser padre. Cuando Verónica se entera, abofetea a su hijo. Gastón le cuenta a Rodrigo con lujo de detalles la verdad de los Lobos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: David reflexiona y está dispuesto a asumir su paternidad. Antonia jura que ese bebé no va a nacer, asegura que alguien se encargará de interrumpir el embarazo de Cecilia. Identifican a Lucho en el hospital y él logra escapar. Macario visita a Ramiro.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Cansada de la agitada vida nocturna de su esposo, Gabriela se sincera con Sara, quien decide vigilar de cerca a Fernando y lo sigue hasta las pesebreras, donde tiene una cita con su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara le cuenta a su madre delante de Martín lo que vio y juntas van tras Fernando hasta una casa, donde reconocen en la oscuridad a su amante, Gabriela pide un arma y discute con su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: Los herederos del monte

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, four teams battle it out in the final leg for the million-dollar prize, but one team will face a shocking elimination before making it to the finish line, on the season finale.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, THE AMAZING RACE features 11 new teams of all dating duos: six who are preexisting couples, and five duos who meet for the first time at the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise in Thailand as one team forgets their fanny pack, putting them behind, and one Racer celebrates the end of the leg when they pop a very special question.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams face a race within the Race when they attempt to navigate the chaotic streets of Bangkok, and Racers eat a traditional delicacy - a "1,000 year old egg."

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers strap on lederhosen for a trip to Oktoberfest in Bavaria, Germany, and one team finds their race in jeopardy after losing their fanny pack.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, the Race travels to Monaco, where one team takes a big risk to gain an edge on the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In the premiere of the 15th season, Tom replaces sash balancers on an antique window. Roger and Kevin check out the benefits of a robotic lawnmower. And Richard talks about treating water with lead.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits Chicago to explore the dangers of home fires and ways to stay safe. Scott shows off a portable generator that doesn’t run on gas. The guys ask, “What is it?” And Richard finds a rusted sink strainer in the kitchen.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin use store-bought stair treads to create a bookshelf in Build It. And landscape designer Jenn Nawada transforms the look of a home’s foundation by using existing plants.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps plant a home orchard using apple and pear trees. Tom shows Kevin how to choose and use a circular saw. Richard installs a new tank water heater and discusses new regulations on them.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom repairs a broken board on a front porch. Richard analyzes a homeowner’s green-stained shower. Scott brings more power to a bedroom and is able to conceal the wiring with crown molding.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns about a way to heat and cool a house using a new room-by-room ventilation system. The guys ask, “What is it?” And Tom explains the best ways to patch a small hole in the wall.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Ross Trethewey helps build a robotic wall that could be the key to tight spaces in urban living. Tom and Kevin use reclaimed pine heart wood to create a bench with a historic theme in Build It.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry arranges a blind date for Jack - with a jewel thief who mistakes him for a fence.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is conned into renting a small restaurant - only to discover that it's a run-down disaster. Guest Star(s): Jordan Charney

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's attempted romance with Felipe's beautiful cousin, Maria, is plagued by problems - Janet, Terri, Maria's inability to speak English, and Maria's fiancé.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is happy that her old friend, Randy, is dating Jack - until she discovers that Randy is married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack hosts a Sunday brunch to convince the Reverend Gilmore that the Bistro is a respectable establishment. He succeeds until the newlywed couple at the next table begin their honeymoon. Guest Star(s): Earl Boen

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is grateful for Larry's suggestion of a free guitarist as a business boost - until he finds out that he has a vocalist - Larry.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley discovers that the nice young man that Janet and Jack have fixed Terri up with is a convicted murderer.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry completely trusts Jack to show his teenage sister around town - until he discovers that they are still out at 2 a.m.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: By the time an innocent story is retold through several people, the trio believes Bob and Carol's marriage is on the rocks. Larry and Terri try to straighten things out with the couple - only to be "caught" by Mr. Furley.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When the Bistro's building inspector demands a bribe from Jack, Janet suggests that they tape the next conversation for evidence. The recording the police hear, however, is of Furley telling Jack he has the pot (terrain) he wanted.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is making plans for her wedding to a soap opera star - until Jack discovers that his sleazy reputation is well-earned.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack challenges a guy who has insulted Furley to a boxing match. His opponent, the girls learn, is a Golden Glove contender with 22 knockouts.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Furley helps Jack lose his "I can stay away for a week" bet with the girls.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Terri believe that Janet is trying to seduce Furley's shy nephew.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Instead of catching sleep in the dingy apartment above his restaurant, Jack catches Mr. Angelino with a young woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Timothy Bradley III
programme.desc: On April 9th, 2016 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the third time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO International Welterweight title in a 12 round bout Bradley went down in round 7 and 9 resulting in a success for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On April 15th, 1985, Marvin Hagler fought Thomas Hearns for the undisputed Middleweight Title at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas. Hagler and Hearns absolutely went at it from the bell which ended with Hagler securing a thrilling knockout victory.

programme.title: Matthew Saad Muhammad vs Yaqui Lopez 1
programme.desc: On October 24th, 1978 Matthew Saad Muhammad fought Yaqui Lopez for the first time for Light Heavyweight titles at the Spectrum in Philidelphia, in a 15 round bout that ended in the fourteenth round securing the victory for Muhammad.

programme.title: Michael Carabajal vs Jorge Arce
programme.desc: On July 31st, 1999 Michael Carabajal faced Jorge Arce for the WBO World Light flyweight title at Plaza de Toros El Toreo in Tijuana in a 12 round bout that went 11 rounds giving the bout to Carabajal.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997 Micky Ward and Alfonso Sanchez faced eachother at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas the 10 round bout ended after seven giving Ward the victory by technical knockout.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Antonio Margarito 2
programme.desc: On December 3rd, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Antonio Margarito in a highly anticipated championship rematch at the Madison Square Garden in New York. This time around, Cotto showed his dominance from the start and stopped Margarito in the 9th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Delvin Rodriguez
programme.desc: On October 5th, 2013 Miguel Cotto battled Delvin Rodriguez at the Amway Center in Orlando, Fl. The originally twelve round bout lasted three rounds and ended by technical knockout in third round securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Joshua Clottey
programme.desc: On June 13th, 2009, Miguel Cotto fought Joshua Clottey for the WBO World Welterweight Title at Madison Square Garden in New York. Despite Clottey landing more shots, Cotto was persistent with his attack, helping him earn a close split decision win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Kelson Pinto
programme.desc: On September 11th, 2004 Miguel Cotto faced Kelson Pinto at the Coliseo Jose Miguel Agrelot in Hato Rey in battle for WBO World Super lightweight titles with the bout ending halfway through in the sixth round securing the win for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Muhammad Abdullaev
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2005 Miguel Cotto faced Muhammad Abdullaev for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York the twelve round bout ended in the ninth securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.
